workflow: RupeeKit Workflow 8D-G - Gemini Low-Cost Image Generator

sourceCreative.workflow: RupeeKit Workflow 8C - Anti-Repetition AI Social Creative Generator

promptsUsed.sourcePrompt: A bold, clean, modern social media graphic for a finance utility brand. The central design features a prominent, readable text overlay in a deep blue font: 'Are you overlooking key details in your FD calculations?'. Below this, in a fresh green font, smaller text reads: 'Estimate it on RupeeKit.'. The background is a clean white/light grey, with subtle geometric patterns or abstract financial elements in deep blue and fresh green, hinting at data analysis or planning. A stylized, minimalist icon representing a checklist or a magnifying glass over a document is subtly integrated to reinforce the 'document_checklist' and 'mistake_warning' theme. The overall aesthetic is professional, trustworthy, and visually appealing, avoiding any human figures, faces, or personal branding. Ensure the top-right corner is clear and uncluttered. Output as a PNG or JPG. No humans, no human faces, no people, no personal identity, no mascot.
promptsUsed.sanitizedPrompt:
Create exactly one clean, premium social media finance image.

Platform:
facebook

Required aspect ratio:
16:9

Use this visual concept:
A bold, clean, modern social media graphic for a finance utility brand. The central design features a prominent, readable text overlay in a deep blue font: 'Are you overlooking key details in your FD calculations?'. Below this, in a fresh green font, smaller text reads: 'Estimate it on finance calculator.'. The background is a clean white/light grey, with subtle geometric patterns or abstract financial elements in deep blue and fresh green, hinting at data analysis or planning. A stylized, minimalist icon representing a checklist or a magnifying glass over a document is subtly integrated to reinforce the 'document_checklist' and 'mistake_warning' theme. The overall aesthetic is professional, trustworthy, and visually appealing, avoiding any human figures, faces, or personal branding. Ensure the top-right corner is clear and uncluttered. Output as a PNG or JPG. No humans, no human faces, no people, no personal identity, no mascot.

Strict brand and layout rules:
- Do NOT generate the RupeeKit logo.
- Do NOT generate the word RupeeKit.
- Do NOT generate RupeKit or any similar brand spelling.
- Do NOT generate any website URL.
- Do NOT generate a watermark.
- Do NOT generate a fake app brand header.
- Do NOT generate a blank white square placeholder for the logo.
- Do NOT draw any visible placeholder box in the top-right corner.
- The top-right corner must remain natural plain background only.
- Do NOT place any text, icon, chart, button, UI object, circle, callout, or badge in the top-right corner.
- The official logo will be added later by another workflow, so do not draw it.

Allowed design elements:
- Short readable finance text is allowed in the main content area only.
- Calculator UI mockup is allowed.
- Large readable headings are allowed.
- Input labels like Monthly SIP Amount, Investment Duration, Expected Return, Estimated Future Value are allowed.
- Charts, calculator cards, rupee symbols, growth arrows, and finance UI elements are allowed.
- Use white or very light background with deep blue and fresh green accents.
- Keep the design clean, modern, premium, uncluttered, and social-media friendly.
- No people, no human faces, no mascot, no personal identity.
- Finance calculator utility look, not a bank ad, not a loan ad, not an investment promise.

Output:
Return image output only.
The image must be suitable for social media upload as PNG or JPG.
